The '''Queen's Honor Guard''' was the name given to the group of [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] who escorted the [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] offworld. The Honor Guard consisted of members of the [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps]] division of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]].<ref name="Scrapbook" />

{{Military-stub}}
